violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC took unit out of service and will sanitize via 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown/black debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC discarded ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back hall, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026
Cleaned and sanitized cocktail strainers are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The floors and pipes/tubes behind bar equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The ceiling tile above the ice machine is in poor repair (tile missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment must use 3 bay sink to sanitize all glassware. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The floors under the bar and soda syrup lines in basement have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
